name: Whoopee Pies # 2
recipeInstructions: Cream the shortening and sugar; add the egg yolks. Sift the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture with milk, vanilla, and salt. Drop spoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets and bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes. When cool, press two cookies together and fill them with smooth filling made from beaten egg whites, confectioner's sugar, vanilla, and a dash of salt. Adjust consistency with water if needed.
